{# vendor/partials/otp_verify.html — Shown after card tap, vendor enters OTP #}

Card Detected — OTP Sent

A secure 6-digit dynamic authorization code has been dispatched to the registered customer's mobile device (Phone ending in ****{{ phone_tail }}).

Charging: PKR {{ "{:,}".format(amount) }} to {{ cardholder }}

Code expires in {{ expiry_minutes }} minutes.
